name: Evi’s Vegetable Soup

ingredients.item: medium leeks, washed well, cut into small rounds
turnips, peeled and cut into small dice
small celeriac, peeled and cut into small dice
bunch cavolo nero (black cabbage), cut into strips

method: Serves 6–8 25 g unsalted butter 2 tablespoons good-quality virgin olive oil 3–4 veal shanks, ends cut to expose the marrow 2 medium leeks, washed well, cut into small rounds 2 turnips, peeled and cut into small dice 1 small celeriac, peeled and cut into small dice about 7 small carrots, cut into rounds 250 ml dry white wine 1 bunch cavolo nero (black cabbage), cut into strips 3 litres water sea salt flakes and ground black pepper 1 bunch flat-leaf parsley, chopped
Remove the bones and, with a small spoon, scrape out the marrow. Stir the marrow into the soup. Break up any large chunks of meat in the soup with a wooden spoon.
Stir the parsley through the soup and serve with crusty bread.
